name: Web egress allowlist
description: Blocks web_fetch to any host not on a configured allowlist (egress control at the tool layer; spec §3.10 L4 / critique P1-3).

allowDomains.description: Allowed fetch hosts. A bare domain (github.com) also matches its subdomains; use *.example.com for subdomain-only. Empty/unset = built-in default list.
